coverage: 100% of all reachable node types across 14 groups and 302 nodes.
parameter_sweep: Authored, 3x3, depth 40, horizontal divider, two vertical dividers, and raised-divider cases match topology exactly. Grid-lines mode is near-exact at 13,322 / 12,443 versus Blender 13,328 / 12,449 (-0.05%), with bounds within 0.0004 units.
validation: Modifier named-attribute bindings preserve the source profile's top-edge and inner-wall selections; closed planar Curve to Mesh frames and the evaluated hollow-foot dependency reproduce Blender's complete bin shell and placement. Crossing cyclic outlines are now split into a planar arrangement before triangle filling, leaving only one clipped groove junction (six swept vertices/faces) different from Blender in the optional grid-lines branch.
